name: Pudding Mix
recipeIngredient: 2 1/3 cups Instant non fat dry milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ingredients thoroughly.
2. Store in tightly covered container in refrigerator. Use within 3 months.
About 2-1/2 cups mix
